positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_problem
% SZS output start Proof for pos_problem
1. man(michael) [input(axiom)]
2. man(peter) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : ((in_class(X0) & X0 != michael) => taller(michael,X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. taller(peter,michael) [input(axiom)]
6. ! [X0,X1] : ((man(X0) & man(X1) & taller(X0,X1)) => can_block(X0,X1)) [input(axiom)]
8. ~can_block(michael,windy) [input(axiom)]
10. in_class(windy) [input(axiom)]
11. man(windy) [input(axiom)]
12. can_block(peter,windy) [input(conjecture)]
13. ~can_block(peter,windy) [negated conjecture 12]
14. ~can_block(peter,windy) [flattening 13]
19. ! [X0] : (taller(michael,X0) | (~in_class(X0) | michael = X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
20. ! [X0] : (taller(michael,X0) | ~in_class(X0) | michael = X0) [flattening 19]
21. ! [X0,X1] : (can_block(X0,X1) | (~man(X0) | ~man(X1) | ~taller(X0,X1))) [ennf transformation 6]
22. ! [X0,X1] : (can_block(X0,X1) | ~man(X0) | ~man(X1) | ~taller(X0,X1)) [flattening 21]
23. man(michael) [cnf transformation 1]
24. man(peter) [cnf transformation 2]
26. taller(michael,X0) | ~in_class(X0) | michael = X0 [cnf transformation 20]
27. taller(peter,michael) [cnf transformation 5]
28. ~taller(X0,X1) | ~man(X0) | ~man(X1) | can_block(X0,X1) [cnf transformation 22]
29. ~can_block(michael,windy) [cnf transformation 8]
30. in_class(windy) [cnf transformation 10]
31. man(windy) [cnf transformation 11]
32. ~can_block(peter,windy) [cnf transformation 14]
35. ~man(peter) | ~man(michael) | can_block(peter,michael) [resolution 28,27]
36. ~man(michael) | ~man(X0) | can_block(michael,X0) | ~in_class(X0) | michael = X0 [resolution 28,26]
37. can_block(michael,X0) | ~man(X0) | ~in_class(X0) | michael = X0 [forward subsumption resolution 36,23]
38. ~man(michael) | can_block(peter,michael) [forward subsumption resolution 35,24]
39. can_block(peter,michael) [forward subsumption resolution 38,23]
54. ~man(windy) | ~in_class(windy) | michael = windy [resolution 37,29]
55. ~in_class(windy) | michael = windy [forward subsumption resolution 54,31]
56. michael = windy [forward subsumption resolution 55,30]
60. ~can_block(peter,michael) [superposition 32,56]
61. $false [forward subsumption resolution 60,39]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_problem
% Termination reason: Refutation

cnf(u29,axiom,
